- [2023-03-01] **User should improve hip mobility to help with IT band and hip flexor issues** — User is encouraged to perform exercises like leg swings, hip circles, and pigeon poses to increase flexibility and range of motion.
- [2023-03-01] **User should strengthen core to help stabilize pelvis and reduce IT band and hip flexor stress** — User is advised to perform exercises like planks, side planks, and Russian twists to strengthen the core.

- [2023-03-01] **User should perform dynamic stretching as part of cycling warm-up** — Warm-up routine: Include leg swings, hip circles, knee lifts, and ankle rotations for 5-10 minutes.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform muscle activation exercises as part of cycling warm-up** — Warm-up routine: Include glute bridges, calf raises, and core engagement for 5-10 minutes.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform final spin as part of cycling warm-up** — Warm-up routine: Gradually increase intensity to a moderate pace for 5-10 minutes, focusing on pedaling technique.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform IT band stretch to prevent tightness** — Stretch: Stand with affected side closest to a wall, cross opposite leg over, bend knee and lean towards wall, hold for 30 seconds.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform hip flexor stretch to prevent tightness** — Stretch: Kneel on all fours, bring one knee forward, lean forward to stretch front of hip, hold for 30 seconds.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform lateral leg stretch to prevent tightness** — Stretch: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, take a large step to one side, lower body down, hold for 30 seconds.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform piriformis stretch to prevent tightness** — Stretch: Sit on floor with affected leg crossed over other leg, pull knee towards opposite shoulder, hold for 30 seconds.
- [2023-03-01] **User is experiencing tightness in IT band and hip flexors after bike rides** — User reports feeling tightness in IT band and hip flexors, especially after Saturday morning bike rides.
- [2023-03-01] **User should perform foam rolling for IT band and hip flexors** — Foam rolling exercises: IT band roll, lateral leg roll, hip flexor roll, and piriformis roll to alleviate tightness.
